inclusion_rule: A class is in current demonstrated scope only when at least one explicit instance has a preserved mapping or deterministic execution artifact covering structural, semantic, operational, dependency, information, and historical commitments, with no unresolved required dimension.
exclusion_rule: Classes with only conceptual discussion, partial mappings, inaccessible internal state, unresolved preservation dimensions, or no executable artifact are not in demonstrated scope.

included_classes.boundary: Finite declared variables, explicit guards and updates, inspectable transition history, and explicit rule-status modification.
The modification point, prior rule status, successor rule status, and later operational consequences must be recorded.
Trace generation and preservation claims must be reproducible from repository artifacts.

investigated_but_unresolved_classes.reason: Visible prompts and outputs are representable, but ordinary proprietary or under-instrumented runs do not expose enough semantic, operational, dependency, or information-preservation evidence.
Documented traces may be structurally represented, but tool-state, hidden policy, memory, and dependency capture are often incomplete.
Tacit, perceptual, and unreported processes prevent complete operational and information preservation.
Explicit structure mappings are representable, but relevance selection and creative generation remain underdetermined.
Representable with additional machinery for authority, jurisdiction, defeasibility, standards, and time-indexed sources; not yet demonstrated as core-only scope.

excluded_from_current_claims: continuous or unbounded reasoning processes without a finite preserved artifact
private internal states inferred only from behavior
semantic equivalence asserted without identity or commitment-equivalence criteria
universal necessity, global minimality, or unique optimality
scope_expansion_requirements: freeze a representative benchmark before evaluation
record explicit source artifacts and observability limits
construct at least three independent mappings when making reproducibility claims
resolve all six preservation dimensions or retain the class as unresolved
record required domain-specific extensions separately from the core vocabulary
run alternative-vocabulary comparison where a scope expansion is used to support necessity or universality
